summary: Completed comprehensive SEO/AEO/GEO testing for Veracity Technologies landing page. All 6 JSON-LD schemas, meta tags, accessibility attributes, and interactive features tested successfully.
passed_tests: Page loads correctly with all 14 sections visible
All 6 JSON-LD structured data schemas present (Organization, LocalBusiness, WebPage, ItemList, FAQPage, Offer)
All Open Graph meta tags present (5/5): og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type, og:url
All Twitter Card meta tags present (4/4): twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image
Canonical URL correctly points to https://www.veracitytech.com/
Geographic meta tags present: geo.region=US-MN, geo.placename, geo.position
Meta robots directive allows indexing: index, follow
Meta keywords tag present with relevant terms
Navigation has role='navigation' and aria-label 'Main navigation'
Footer has role='contentinfo' and descriptive aria-label
11 sections have proper aria-label attributes for accessibility
/llms.txt accessible with comprehensive company information (5/6 sections found)
/sitemap.xml accessible with proper XML structure and all expected URLs
FAQ accordion fully functional - aria-expanded states change correctly
Phishing game fully functional - start, answer, score tracking, and progression working
